keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $736.40 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $746.77 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into tomorrow: Bullish — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $736.40 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: AMD CALL — enter $32.48–$35.90, target $51.28+, stop $20.51.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Stocks closed higher with SPY +0.78% and QQQ +1.70%. Composite sentiment +39 (Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, spy trend, market breadth (a/d). VIX at 14.06 (-1.89%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Leadership came from Technology; Healthcare lagged. Today's standouts: AMD +7.68%, AAPL +2.70%. Laggards: COIN -3.60%, NFLX -3.23%. Carrying AMD as the top idea into tomorrow (7.0/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
